summaryAm: ደግ ልዑል እና ትንሽ ወፍ ከተማቸውን በርኅራኄ የሚመለከቱበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ሌሎችን ማስታወስ እና ትንሽ እርዳታ መስጠት ከብርሃን በላይ ይደምቃል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በከተማ መካከል ቆንጆ የልዑል ሐውልት ቆሞ ነበር።
pages.textEn: In the middle of the city stood a beautiful statue of a prince.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Happy Prince, page 1: በከተማ መካከል ቆንጆ የልዑል ሐውልት ቆሞ ነበር።

pages.textAm: አንድ ትንሽ ወፍ በሐውልቱ እግር ሥር አረፈች።
pages.textEn: A little bird rested at the foot of the statue.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Happy Prince, page 2: አንድ ትንሽ ወፍ በሐውልቱ እግር ሥር አረፈች።

pages.textAm: ልዑሉ ከላይ ሰዎችን ሲያይ ማን እርዳታ እንደሚፈልግ አስተዋለ።
pages.textEn: From above, the prince noticed who needed help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Happy Prince, page 3: ልዑሉ ከላይ ሰዎችን ሲያይ ማን እርዳታ እንደሚፈልግ አስተዋለ።

pages.textAm: ወፏ ትንሽ መልእክቶችን ወደ ቤቶች በደስታ አደረሰች።
pages.textEn: The bird happily carried little messages to homes.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Happy Prince, page 4: ወፏ ትንሽ መልእክቶችን ወደ ቤቶች በደስታ አደረሰች።

pages.textAm: ወፏ መልእክቱን ስታደርስ ሰዎች በመስኮቶቻቸው ተመለከቱ። “ማንን መርዳት እንችላለን?” ብለው በቀስታ ጠየቁ።
pages.textEn: As the bird carried the message, people looked from their windows and gently asked who they could help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Happy Prince, page 5: city neighbors looking from warm windows as a little bird carries a kind message.

pages.textAm: ልዑሉ እና ወፏ ከላይ ተመለከቱ። ትንሽ መልእክት ብዙ ደግ እጆችን ሊያነቃ እንደሚችል ተስፋ አዩ።
pages.textEn: The prince and the bird watched from above and hoped one small message could awaken many kind hands.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Happy Prince, page 6: prince statue and little bird watching hopeful city lights from above.

pages.textAm: ትንሿ ወፍ ከሐውልቱ ላይ ከተማውን ተመለከተች። በአንድ መስኮት እናት ለልጇ ሞቃት ልብስ እንደምትፈልግ አየች።
pages.textEn: The little bird saw a family that needed warm clothes.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Small bird and prince statue looking over a warm city square.

pages.textAm: ልዑሉ “ትንሽ መልእክት ወደ ጎረቤቶች አድርሺ” አለ። ወፏም በፍጥነት በርኅራኄ መልእክቱን አደረሰች።
pages.textEn: The prince asked the bird to carry a kind message to neighbors.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Bird carrying a small message from a prince statue to nearby homes.

pages.textAm: ጎረቤቶቹ ሸሚዝ፣ ካልሲ እና ትንሽ ምግብ አመጡ። እናቱም በደስታ አመሰገነች።
pages.textEn: Neighbors brought clothes and food, and the mother thanked them.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Neighbors bringing warm clothes and food to a grateful family.

pages.textAm: በሌላ ጎዳና አንድ አዛውንት ብቻውን ተቀምጦ ነበር። ወፏ መልእክት አድርሳ ልጆች እንዲጎበኙት አሳሰበች።
pages.textEn: On another street, the bird helped children remember a lonely elder.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Small bird guiding children to visit an elder on a city street.

pages.textAm: ከተማው በትንንሽ ደግነቶች መብራት ጀመረ። ልዑሉ እና ወፏ ብርሃኑ በሰዎች ልብ ውስጥ እንዳለ ተደሰቱ።
pages.textEn: The city brightened with small kindnesses in many hearts.
pages.illustrationPrompt: City square glowing warmly as people help one another near the prince statue.
